name: LLaMA.cpp
targetDescription: Private, OpenAI-compatible LLM inference server. Drop GGUF models in a volume, get a ChatGPT-like API and embeddings — no GPU, no third-party keys.
notes: Icon served from standalone public repo INAPP-Mobile/railway-llama-cpp (railway-templates is a private repo, raw.githubusercontent.com can't serve from it). Variable defaults in template-editor-raw.json must be pasted into the service Raw JSON editor before publishing.
publishCommand: bash scripts/railway.sh templates publish lR5GrQ --category "AI/ML" --description "Private, OpenAI-compatible LLM inference server. Drop GGUF models in a volume, get a ChatGPT-like API and embeddings — no GPU, no third-party keys." --image "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/INAPP-Mobile/railway-llama-cpp/master/template-icon.svg" --readme-file README.md
dashboardSteps: Paste template-editor-raw.json into the service's Raw JSON editor (sets variable defaults)
Publish via CLI with the publishCommand above (--image sets icon URL at publish time)
